package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormModelOutsideModelsPackage() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_model_outside_models_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM-backed structs with `gorm` tags declared outside `model` or `models` packages unless an explicit `entity` or `schema` package already exists."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
